import os, shutil

def main():
    os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
    src = '/models/triposr'
    dst = 'checkpoints/triposr'
    if os.path.exists(dst):
        shutil.rmtree(dst)
    shutil.copytree(src, dst)
    print('Checkpoint saved to checkpoints/triposr')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
